description: PR3 scenario #9 — cold-start parity. baseline_placements=None reproduces PR2 baseline behaviour byte-for-byte (minus the new additive PR3 payload keys which default to 0 or {}). This is the parity contract that guarantees no existing scenario changes placement decisions when PR3 is merged in cold-start mode.
notes: Acceptance-bar #3: byte-for-byte parity with PR2 minus the new additive payload keys.
